home.title: EffortGo - Personal Web Apps
home.eyebrow: Personal web apps for focused progress
home.description: EffortGo is a personal web app platform built for efficiency and self-improvement. Every small effort leaves a trace, and every focused action turns into long-term value.

highlights.title: Minimal by design
highlights.description: Focus on the essential workflows and keep attention away from noise, clutter, and information overload.

highlights.title: Polished everywhere
highlights.description: A consistent, responsive experience across desktop, mobile, and installed PWA usage.

highlights.title: Continuous progress
highlights.description: Turn everyday actions into a clear, reviewable trail so each effort is easier to see and continue.

apps.name: Flash Maple
apps.description: Helps Canadian immigrants follow local life and practical information while improving English through real-world reading.

apps.name: EG Tools
apps.description: Minimal and convenient online tools that ease work and life by combining efficiency with simplicity.

apps.name: PDFCraft
apps.description: Professional PDF tools that are free, secure, and easy to use for all your PDF needs.
